scenes.title: custom_ui_wrapper.dart
scenes.code:
InteractiveViewer(
  maxScale: 4.0,
  minScale: 0.5,
  constrained: false, // For content bigger than viewport
  child: Text( // Example: complex custom painter
    'Your Custom UI Here',
    style: TextStyle(fontSize: 50, color: Colors.green),
  ),
)
